'''chazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bibliophilically|bibliophilically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bibliophilically|bibliophilically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chazate|chazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chazatesher|chazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazatesherĂ«m|chazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazatero|chazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chazateshĂ«|chazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazateshĂ«m|chazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazatero|gokichazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichazateshĂ«|gokichazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazateshĂ«m|gokichazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochazankerom|gochazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochazankeshĂ«|gochazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazankeshĂ«m|gochazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochazankeya|gochazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazaterom|chazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazatemu|chazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chazateya|chazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazaterom|gokichazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazatemu|gokichazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichazateya|gokichazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chazazate|chazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chazazatesher|chazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazazatesherĂ«m|chazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazazatero|chazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chazazateshĂ«|chazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazazateshĂ«m|chazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazazatero|gokichazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichazazateshĂ«|gokichazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazazateshĂ«m|gokichazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochazazankerom|gochazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochazazankeshĂ«|gochazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazazankeshĂ«m|gochazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochazazankeya|gochazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazazaterom|chazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazazatemu|chazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chazazateya|chazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazazaterom|gokichazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazazatemu|gokichazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichazazateya|gokichazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠte|chĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠtesher|chĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠtero|chĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzĂŠtero|gokichĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠterom|chĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠtemu|chĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠzĂŠteya|chĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzĂŠterom|gokichĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzĂŠteya|gokichĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafzafte|chafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafzaftesher|chafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafzaftesherĂ«m|chafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafzaftero|chafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafzafteshĂ«|chafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafzafteshĂ«m|chafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafzaftero|gokichafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafzafteshĂ«|gokichafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafzafteshĂ«m|gokichafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafzafnkerom|gochafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafzafnkeshĂ«|gochafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafzafnkeshĂ«m|gochafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafzafnkeya|gochafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafzafterom|chafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafzaftemu|chafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafzafteya|chafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafzafterom|gokichafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafzaftemu|gokichafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafzafteya|gokichafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
